channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This “quantum” material fooled scientists and revealed something new
item.description: A mysterious magnetic material once thought to host an exotic “quantum spin liquid” has turned out to be something entirely different—and possibly jus...

item.title: Ancient DNA reveals a lost population near Paris replaced by strangers
item.description: Ancient DNA from a tomb near Paris reveals a shocking prehistoric reset: one population vanished and was replaced by newcomers from the south. The two...

item.title: This donut-shaped discovery just shattered a 150-year math rule
item.description: A 150-year-old rule in geometry has been proven wrong. Mathematicians found two different doughnut-shaped surfaces that look identical when measured l...

item.title: DNA reveals a hidden pitviper species in China
item.description: A vivid green pitviper hiding in Sichuan’s misty mountains has been revealed as a completely new species. Scientists had overlooked it for decades, as...

item.title: Scientists stunned as JWST finds ice clouds on a giant alien planet
item.description: Scientists have discovered unexpected water-ice clouds on a distant, Jupiter-like exoplanet, challenging current atmospheric models. By directly imagi...

item.title: Podcast: Increasing domestic critical minerals supplies
item.description: Critical minerals play an essential role in modern technologies, and a domestic supply is essential for national security. Elizabeth Holley discusses ...

item.title: Podcast: The future of quantum computing
item.description: The future of quantum information science and engineering promises computers with unprecedented speed and capabilities. Mikhail Lukin, an NSF-supporte...

item.title: NSF announces 2026 Graduate Research Fellowship Program award offers
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) today announced that it has made offers and will award 2,500 Graduate Research Fellowships for the 2026-202...

item.title: Podcast: AI-powered labs accelerating scientific discovery
item.description: U.S. National Science Foundation-supported engineers are developing a bold new vision for chemical and materials discovery. Milad Abolhasani, a profes...

item.title: NSF initiative aims to make every American worker, business and community AI-ready
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced a new funding opportunity as part of an effort to enable all Americans to understand, apply and create ...
